ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: ($Setup.Application_Config_Settings__c.Run_Insolvency_Status_Validations__c == True) && CONTAINS($Profile.Name,"Community User") && (ISNEW() || ISCHANGED(Insolvency_Status__c)) && (Not( (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided")&& ISNEW()) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Wait / Hold") && ISNEW()) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISNEW()) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISNEW() ) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Trustee Followup")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Wait / Hold") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Trustee Followup")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"For Owner Review")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Wait / Hold") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Wait / Hold") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Trustee Followup") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "For Owner Review") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"PoC Details Provided")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "For Owner Review") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"No PoC Required")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "For Owner Review") &&ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"Wait / Hold")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "Withdraw PoC") && NOT( ISNEW())) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "BOT Review") && NOT( ISNEW())) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "BOT Review completed") && NOT( ISNEW())) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "No PoC Required") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"BOT Review completed")) || (ISPICKVAL(Insolvency_Status__c, "PoC Details Provided") && ISPICKVAL(PRIORVALUE(Insolvency_Status__c),"BOT Review completed")) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: Invalid Insolvency Account Processing Status change
